metadata.description: Sign up for Trusted Care Foundation mental health training sessions.

smsConsent.heading: Communication Consent
smsConsent.introBold: Trusted Care Foundation sends reminders and updates about this training.
smsConsent.legalBeforeLink: Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out at any time; reply HELP for help. By selecting Yes below, I agree to the SMS Terms and acknowledge the SMS Privacy Policy:
smsConsent.yesLabel: I consent to receive messages from Trusted Care Foundation.
smsConsent.noLabel: I do not consent to receive SMS messages from Trusted Care Foundation.
